zh.Spöck, Karlsruhe, Baden, Deutschland: 巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧史額可
巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特
zh.Staffort, Karlsruhe, Baden, Germany: 巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特
zh.Staffort, Baden, Germany: 巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hanß Peter Stober於1683年9月22日出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特時，他的父親Hanß Jost Stober45歲，母親Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter25歲。他於1707年10月25日與Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特被列為baker, juryman。他去世於1759年8月11日在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hanß Peter Stober于1683年9月22日出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特时，他的父亲Hanß Jost Stober45岁，母亲Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter25岁。他于1707年10月25日与Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特被列为baker, juryman。他去世于1759年8月11日在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特。

nameMeanings.name: Stober
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Stöber): from Middle High German stöuber ‘hunting dog’, for a hunter or for a curious, restless person.

Germanized form of Sorbian Stobor: from the Old Sorbian personal name Stobor, derived from the imperative stoj ‘stand, stay’ (later interpreted as if derived from sto ‘hundred’) + the element bor ‘to fight’.

variants.name: Stoeber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Willi.

variants.name: Stoebner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Darrold, Helmuth.
German (also Stöbner): variant of Stöber (see Stober ). The surname Stoebner or Stöbner is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Stover
meanings: North German (Stöver): from Middle Low German (bad)stover ‘bather, barber, worker at a public bathhouse’, mainly an occupational name, but occasionally perhaps a nickname for a dedicated bather. Compare Stoever .
English: variant of   Stopher   with intervocalic voicing of /f/ to /v/.

nameMeanings.name: Hanß
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Hanß Peter Stober was born on 22 September 1683, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, his father, Hanß Jost Stober, was 45 and his mother, Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter, was 25. He married Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller on 25 October 1707, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. His occupation is listed as baker, juryman in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. He died on 11 August 1759, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hanß Peter Stober est né le 22 septembre 1683, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, son père, Hanß Jost Stober, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller le 25 octobre 1707, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est baker, juryman à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Il est décédé le 11 août 1759, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hanß Peter Stober am 22. September 1683 in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hanß Jost Stober 45 und seine Mutter Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter 25. Er hat am 25. Oktober 1707 in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als baker, juryman in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. August 1759 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hanß Peter Stober è nato il il 22 settembre 1683 nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, il suo padre, Hanß Jost Stober, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller il 25 ottobre 1707, nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come baker, juryman nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Morì il 11 agosto 1759, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

バデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォート
ja.Staffort, Karlsruhe, Baden, Germany: バデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォート
ja.Staffort, Baden, Germany: バデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォート
ja.lifeSummary: Hanß Peter Stoberが1683年9月22日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートで生まれた時，父Hanß Jost Stoberは45歳，母Anna Catharina Maria Zeiterは25歳であった。1707年10月25日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートでAnna Catharina Elisabetha Muellerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。バデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートでの職業はbaker, jurymanと記録されている。彼は1759年8月11日に故郷で75歳で死去し，バデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hanß Peter Stober(이)가 1683년 9월 22일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hanß Jost Stober(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1707년 10월 25일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 baker, juryman이었다. 그는 1759년 8월 11일 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에 묻혔다.

mn.22 SEP 1683–11 AUG 1759: 1683 оны Есдүгээр сарын 22–1759 оны Наймдугаар сарын 11

pt.22 SEP 1683–11 AUG 1759: 22 de setembro de 1683–11 de agosto de 1759
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hanß Peter Stober nasceu em 22 de setembro de 1683, em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, seu pai, Hanß Jost Stober, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller em 25 de outubro de 1707, em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como baker, juryman em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ele faleceu em 11 de agosto de 1759, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hanß Peter Stober родился 22 сентября 1683 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, его отцу по имени Hanß Jost Stober было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller 25 октября 1707 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии baker, juryman в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. Он умер 11 августа 1759 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден.

es.22 SEP 1683–11 AUG 1759: 22 de septiembre de 1683–11 de agosto de 1759
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hanß Peter Stober nació el 22 de septiembre de 1683, en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, su papá, Hanß Jost Stober, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Anna Catharina Maria Zeiter, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller el 25 de octubre de 1707, en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era baker, juryman en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Murió el 11 de agosto de 1759, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.
